title: Visual Enhancements
description: A Minecraft resource pack that improves visuals by enhancing ore outlines, crop readiness, and item details, while reducing distractions like the pumpkin blur.
body: This Minecraft resource pack is designed for improved visibility and immersion. It outlines all ores for easier mining, marks crops that are ready to harvest, and makes infested blocks distinct with bumblebee stripes to prevent accidental mining. It also minimizes the obstructive pumpkin blur for a better viewing experience and renames music discs with unique, identifiable item names rather than just the default "Music Disc". It also fixes the helmet item textures by adding a nosepiece and shows a visual indicator for bow pulling.
